notes: Spec asserts: (1) Session appears in ready within 1s of agent launch and (2) PID bound within 1s. Both phases anchor to recording start (agent launch) and budget 1000ms. Aider writes a markdown chat history (.aider.chat.history.md) in the cwd on launch; the daemon's FilesUnderCWD watcher emits transcript_new + state_transition→ready inside the first scanner tick. The proc-<PID> pre-session row materialises slightly earlier (~50 ms in this recording) and satisfies both phases on its own.

text: Session appears in ready within 1s of agent launch
